title: research_company_output
description: Shallow research brief extracted from a company's own website. If a field cannot be inferred from the source content, return an empty array or empty string for it.

core_values.description: 3-6 strings capturing the company's stated values, mission, or culture pillars.

recent_projects.description: 3-6 short strings describing recent products, launches, initiatives, or news mentioned on the site. Each item should include a small description.

summary.description: 2-3 sentence plain-text summary of what the company does and its current focus.
